issues.description: Card has effect text but effects array is empty. Must define trigger, condition, and action.
Missing trigger. Text indicates 'End of Your Turn' → trigger should be 'EndOfTurn'
Missing condition. Text requires 'your Leader has {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type' → condition should be 'LeaderHasAnyType' with types ['FILM', 'Straw Hat Crew']
Missing action. Text requires setting up to 2 DON!! cards as active → action type should be 'Rest' (inverse: set active = unrest) targeting up to 2 DON cards on board

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] If your Leader has the {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.
